title: LifeSmart Clearwave Wireless Amplifier 11.015690 SA50+
description:
SA50+ is a WiFi and Bluetooth 5.0 amplifier. Adding SA50+ to your current stereo system will enable you to stream music from your smart device, USB, NAS or streaming services, such as Spotify, Tidal, Deezer, Qobuz, Amazon Music and others by 4STREAM App, AirPlay, Bluetooth or other DLNA apps. Adding more units to your home audio system can set up a wireless multiroom or multizone whole house audio system, it will give you totally new and great experience to play and enjoy your music.
Packaging: English
availability: Catalogue price list / availability under review
